response: The inactivity times for candidates and interviewers are not explicitly mentioned in the provided documentation. If you believe the inactivity times need to be extended, I recommend reaching out to your HackerRank account manager for further assistance.

response: To pause your subscription, please follow these steps: 1. Click on the profile icon in the top-right corner of the page and select Settings from the dropdown menu. 2. Navigate to the Billing section under Subscription. 3. Click the Cancel Plan button. The UI will display a prompt about the new Pause Subscription feature. 4. Select the desired pause duration: minimum 1 month, maximum 12 months. 5. Click Confirm Pause. A confirmation message will appear, displaying the pause duration and the automatic resume date.
justification: The user requested to pause their subscription. The provided support documentation 'Pause Subscription' outlines the steps to do so. [Source: data/hackerrank/settings/user-account-settings-and-preferences/5157311476-pause-subscription.md]

response: To limit crawling activity, you can set your site preferences to enable those you want to access your content and limit those you don’t. To block a Bot from your entire website, add this to the robots.txt file in your top-level directory: User-agent: ClaudeBot Crawl-delay: 1. Please do this for every subdomain that you wish to opt out of our crawling.

response: It seems like you're having trouble with Claude Code and AWS Bedrock. This issue usually occurs when the localhost callback is blocked. Please try using the manual flow instead: copy the URL printed in the terminal, complete login in any browser, then paste the returned code back into the terminal. If you're still facing issues, please ensure that `aws sts get-caller-identity` works and `AWS_REGION` is set to a region where your model is enabled.

response: To remove an employee from your HackerRank hiring account, you can follow the steps to merge multiple HackerRank accounts. Log in to the account you want to keep, go to Settings, and in the Merge Accounts section, enter the username and email address of the account you want to merge. Click Submit and check your email inbox for a confirmation message. Please note that the merge process may take up to 48 hours to complete.
justification: The support ticket involves removing an employee from a HackerRank hiring account, which falls under the 'Account Access' product area. The response is based on the 'Merge Multiple HackerRank Accounts' documentation.
